title: Control your monday.com board from within Slack
excerpt:

Are you tired of the endless to-and-fro between monday.com and Slack to stay on top of your projects? We’ve thoughtfully designed Slack IntegratePlus for monday.com, an app that allows to boost productivity th…

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Are you tired of the endless to-and-fro between monday.com and Slack to stay on top of your projects? We’ve thoughtfully designed Slack IntegratePlus for monday.com, an app that allows to boost productivity through reduced platform-switching.

From real-time actionable notifications to managing your entire monday.com board from within Slack, we’ve got you covered end-to-end. Take a look at this infographic to see how our app fares vs. the native monday.com integration and adds additional value to your work.

monday.com-SIP4M-flyer-Upscale1920×1200 211 KB

Interested in trying us out? Visit us on the monday.com marketplace

Cheers
